creator: aragon@phat.za.net
text:
On 08/09/11 21:36, fidaj wrote:
>     What is fundamentally different from the sysutils/automounter ?

Mine uses devd(8) and technically doesn't auto mount anything, but does 
probe for file systems and labels, and provides a framework for 
mounting/umounting what it finds on command.  The idea is to make it 
behave almost identically to HAL based volume managers.
